Title: Fangs & Tails (New Recolor Wish)
Description:
This mod adds two free mutations: tails (with 7 variants) and fangs. They have no abilities; they are merely for fluff and roleplay. 

This is a lite mod for furries who want to roleplay as a furry but don't want to install Beast Kin or Playable Snapjaws. If this mod doesn't have enough furry features for you, you'd best try one of those instead.

WISH "tail" to recolor your tail.

[u]Compatibility[/u]
Does not conflict with other fangs mods, though I wouldnt select two different fangs mutations at once. Havent tested it with other mods that add their own tails yet.
